final_prompt.prompt:
Create a panoramic scroll painting of the Lantern Festival in Tang Dynasty Chang'an, thousands of lanterns illuminating the night sky.

Style/medium: traditional Chinese gongbi heavy-color painting, meticulous brushwork, Tang Dynasty court painting style, horizontal handscroll format
Composition: elevated bird's-eye view sweeping across the entire cityscape, multiple focal points showing crowds and lantern clusters, continuous narrative flow from left to right
Subject: Tang Dynasty Chang'an city during Lantern Festival, thousands of hanging lanterns in various shapes and sizes, crowds in traditional hanfu, palace buildings and city gates
Scene/backdrop: night sky over ancient Chang'an, city walls and gates visible, palace complex in the distance, streets lined with lantern stalls and decorated trees
Lighting/mood: warm golden lantern glow against deep indigo night sky, soft moonlight, festive and celebratory atmosphere
Color palette: rich mineral pigments with vermilion, malachite green, azurite blue, and gold accents against deep blue-black sky
Materials/textures: silk scroll texture visible, delicate ink outlines, layered color washes, visible brushwork in architectural details
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, Western perspective, electric lighting, modern clothing, cartoon style, oversaturated digital colors
